about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a Colombian passionate about web development, with a philosophy focused on simple and adaptable designs, following good practices in markup and SEO, prioritizing efficiency and readability in coding, always in constant learning.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Some of my personal projects, created with the purpose of putting my knowledge into practice and improving my skills in web development.

items.title: Social
items.description: In development. A minimalist social network focused on the essentials: connecting and sharing between users without distractions.

items.title: Fundadores
items.description: A WordPress theme for the Hogar Infantil Los Fundadores website.

education.title: Education
education.description: My technical background includes the following qualifications:

items.title: Analysis and Development of Information Systems
items.description:
Servicio Nacional de Aprendizaje
Skilled in requirement specification, analysis, design, coding, and implementation of information systems, applying quality best practices throughout the software development lifecycle.

items.title: IT Systems Technician
items.description:
Instituto Nacional de Formacion Tecnica Profesional "Humberto Velasquez Garcia"
Skilled in managing and maintaining hardware and software components, providing technical support, and assisting in the development and deployment of web and desktop applications.
